basics.name: Shreya Patel
basics.title: Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer
basics.summary: Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer with 7+ years of experience designing and delivering impactful systems at scale across Health, E-commerce, Retail, Automobile, and Banking domains. Expertise in building high-performance frontend systems (React, Angular) and robust backend services (Node.js, FastAPI) with a strong focus on reactive web apps, API design, and cloud deployment. Experienced in leading cross-functional teams and architecting scalable frontend and microservice-based systems. Applied AI-assisted engineering workflows to accelerate development velocity and improve code quality.

bullets: Led a team of 5 to build a responsive vaccination platform using React 18 and Node.js, serving 10K+ users and improving accessibility.
Architected Node.js (Express) microservices, enabling scalable SaaS applications handling 2x traffic growth without performance degradation.
Improved MongoDB database performance by 15% through indexing optimization and schema redesign.
Led the standardization of frontend architecture and reusable component patterns across multiple teams, reducing code duplication by 25% and accelerating feature development.
Reduced state synchronization issues by implementing structured Redux architecture and API normalization.
Leveraged AI-assisted development tools (Claude, GitHub Copilot) to accelerate feature delivery by ~30% and reduce debugging time.
experience.techStack: Node.js, React 18, Redux, HTML5, CSS3, JSX, JavaScript, Jest, Bitbucket, Responsive Web Design

bullets: Architected scalable frontend modules for Citi's online Banking Dashboard application using React 18, Node.js and Angular 13, serving 20+ million users.
Architected and integrated RESTful APIs for Citi's banking dashboard, incorporating caching, debouncing, and error handling to ensure secure, high-availability data delivery for millions of users.
Achieved a 15% reduction in initial page load time by optimizing state management, introducing strategic code splitting and lazy loading, and designing shared UI architecture.
Established comprehensive event tagging and analytics monitoring across high-traffic web applications, reducing incident response time by 20% and improving user retention by 15%.
Automated end-to-end CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, slashing deployment time and maintaining a 99% success rate across production releases.
Led a cross-functional team conducting code reviews and technical mentoring that increased team velocity and ensured high-quality deliverables.
experience.techStack: React 18, Node.js, Angular 13, Redux Toolkit, Jasmine & Karma, Jest, BitBucket, Jenkins

bullets: Implemented server-side data aggregation logic using FastAPI, designing optimized endpoints to consolidate meter readings, reducing frontend processing overhead and improving dashboard load performance.
Built a React-based data analytics platform to track auto gas meter installations, improving operational tracking efficiency by 15%.
Developed reusable custom hooks and optimized API data fetching, reducing redundant network calls and improving page responsiveness.
Pioneered enhanced application responsiveness with strategic lazy loading, reducing initial page load by 1.8 seconds and elevating performance metrics.
experience.techStack: FastAPI, React 16, Jest and React testing library, _loDash, TFS, Agile, Scrum

experience.location: White Plains, New York, United States
bullets: Developed scalable React and Angular SPAs for e-commerce and order management systems, supporting thousands of daily users.
Built reusable UI components and refined state management strategies to enhance maintainability and reduce code duplication.
Deployed applications on AWS (EC2, S3) and integrated AWS SES for transactional email automation.
Spearheaded unit testing in a TDD environment, improving code reliability and reducing regression defects.
Designed responsive data visualization dashboards to support real-time business decision-making.
Utilized Sass, Bootstrap, and Media Queries for styling, adhering to the company's style guide.
experience.techStack: React 16.8, Typescript, ES6, JSON, Bootstrap 4.0, API, chart.js, Babel, GIT, Jasmine, AWS SES, AWS S3, HandlebarsJS

achievements.context: Users served at Citi Banking Dashboard
Reduction in page load time through optimization
Reduction in code duplication through standardization
Improvement in developer velocity using AI tools
Traffic growth handled without performance loss
Reduction in initial page load via lazy loading

education.degree: Master of Science in Information Systems
Bachelor of Sciences in Computer Applications
